name: chaos-substrate
description: Persistent code knowledge memory with MCP tools for indexing, querying, feature context, change-plan decomposition over a layered feature hierarchy, feature explanation pages, and client-facing feature storyboards (with real-UI previews).

interface.shortDescription: Index projects, query code memory, and explain features.
interface.longDescription: Agent workflow, MCP tools, and helper commands for initializing, updating, querying, building feature context, generating feature-memory websites, and composing client/user-facing feature storyboards with the Rust-only Chaos Substrate code knowledge memory.
defaultPrompt: Index this project with Chaos Substrate.
Explain this feature with Chaos Substrate.
Find implementation context for this feature.
